experience.description: Developed automation scripts using Java and Selenium, performed functional and regression testing, reported bugs in Jira, and collaborated with developers to define acceptance criteria for an ad network management platform.

Performed testing for an AI-powered API platform (RIM.AI) and a banking modernization project (OCBC BA Teller). Developed API automation scripts using Java and JUnit, worked in Agile Scrum teams, managed a small team, defined test cases, and reported defects in Jira.
Completed technical training in Testing Fundamentals, Java, Selenium, SQL, Page Object Model (POM), Apache POI, BDD (Cucumber), Appium, and soft skills for an international business environment.
